hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: PEN damage is upgraded to Ultra PEN damage.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra Kagune Lacerate: PEN Rate 40%, inflicts 2 extra Weak points. If the target is immune to Weak, deals extra damage equal to 160% of ATK. If this skill makes the target Weak or the target is already Weak, this bonus damage is doubled.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the target.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Kagune Lacerate: PEN Rate +30%, inflicts 2 extra Weak points. If the target is immune to Weak, deals extra damage equal to 100% of ATK. If the target is already Weak, this extra damage is doubled
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra Kagune Lacerate: PEN Rate 40%, inflicts 2 extra Weak points. If the target is immune to Weak, deals extra damage equal to 160% of ATK. If this skill makes the target Weak or the target is already Weak, this bonus damage is doubled.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1114_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: After an enemy casts an active skill, remove up to 4 buffs or stance effects from the target. Gain 1 stack of #Entry_2# for each effect removed. At 4 stacks of #Entry_2#, remove all self's debuffs and immobilize effects, then unleash a Kagune Restraint Attack on the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing #Entry_1# damage equal to 270% of ATK. Consume all #Entry_2# afterward
skills.max_desc_short_translated: After an enemy casts an active skill, remove up to 4 buffs or stance effects from the target. Gain 1 stack of #Entry_2# for each effect removed. At 4 stacks of #Entry_2#, remove all self's debuffs and immobilize effects, then unleash a Kagune Restraint Attack on the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing #Entry_1# damage equal to 270% of ATK. Consume all #Entry_2# afterward

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1114_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: Increase all ability values ​​of our unorganized characters by 20%, and increase the damage caused by ourselves by 20%. When our turn starts, we will gain 2 pieces of #Entry_2#. Within the 2 turn, #Entry_1# will be 6% of the current attack power of all enemies, and can only be superimposed 2 times.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Increase all ability values ​​of our unorganized characters by 20%, and increase the damage caused by ourselves by 20%. When our turn starts, we will gain 2 pieces of #Entry_2#. Within the 2 turn, #Entry_1# will be 6% of the current attack power of all enemies, and can only be superimposed 2 times.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1114_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: After casting an active skill, if the target's HP is below 80%, deal extra damage equal to 300% of ATK. If the target's HP drops below 40% after this hit, inflict #Entry_1# on the target for 1 turn
skills.max_desc_short_translated: After casting an active skill, if the target's HP is below 80%, deal extra damage equal to 300% of ATK. If the target's HP drops below 40% after this hit, inflict #Entry_1# on the target for 1 turn
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Disordered Action: Unable to act, basic stats -6%, damage taken from the first active skill each turn +50%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Disordered Action: Unable to act, basic stats -6%, damage taken from the first active skill each turn +50%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst grants all allied characters damage dealt by 8% for 1 turn
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst grants all allied characters damage dealt by 8% for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1114_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: Increase all ability values ​​of our unorganized characters by 20%, and increase the damage caused by ourselves by 20%. When our turn begins, we will gain 2 pieces of #Entry_2#, #Entry_1# 6% of the current attack power of all enemies within the 2 turn, and can only be superimposed 2 times. When our character attacks an enemy target with the #Entry_1# effect, 2 buffs or posture effects will be released randomly on the target. Each time 1 buffs or posture effects are successfully removed, the damage of this skill will be increased by 15%
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Increase all ability values ​​of our unorganized characters by 20%, and increase the damage caused by ourselves by 20%. When our turn begins, we will gain 2 pieces of #Entry_2#, #Entry_1# 6% of the current attack power of all enemies within the 2 turn, and can only be superimposed 2 times. When our character attacks an enemy target with the #Entry_1# effect, 2 buffs or posture effects will be released randomly on the target. Each time 1 buffs or posture effects are successfully removed, the damage of this skill will be increased by 15%
